model_type: 2D axisymmetric finite-element screening model, linear elastic stress solve over forming stages
production_warning: This is a real finite-element stiffness solve for each stage, but it is not a full nonlinear large-strain elastoplastic contact forming simulation. Use Abaqus/DEFORM/Forge/Simufact for production FEA.

collar.functional_bore_reason: Rectified to user's Punch IV sketch; Ø7.80/7.75 nose treated as lead/relief, not final through-bore.

tooling.KO_pin_clearance_note: KO pin face is kept below Ø8.50 final bore to eject without sizing the ID.

volume_screen.note: Actual cut-off must include pierce slug, flash/trim, and forming losses.
